name: Coral Ceramic Mug
description: A hand-thrown stoneware mug glazed in a warm coral-pink finish. Holds 12oz, microwave and dishwasher safe.

name: Cypress Serving Bowl
description: A wide stoneware serving bowl in a deep cypress green glaze, perfect for salads or fruit.

name: Vanilla Bud Vase
description: A slim bud vase in a warm vanilla glaze, hand-thrown and finished with a satin surface.

name: Moss Speckled Mug
description: A speckled stoneware mug in muted moss, with a comfortable pulled handle.

name: Blush Pasta Bowl
description: A deep pasta bowl with a soft blush interior and natural stoneware exterior.

name: Ink Carafe
description: A tall water carafe in a near-black ink glaze with a hand-carved pouring lip.

name: Cream Side Plate Set
description: Set of two side plates in an unglazed cream finish, great for pairing with any drop.

name: Terracotta Tumbler
description: A small handleless tumbler with a raw terracotta rim and coral glaze interior.
